top_gap_prompt: Open source or affordable automation tools instead of Boomi
category_long: enterprise automation platform for business and IT integration teams

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Workato's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Workato's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Workato lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable automation tools instead of Boomi
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How can a IT Ops Lead or Enterprise Automation Manager at a large company automate complex enterprise workflows connecting 1000 plus business applications more efficiently?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What software helps with connect SAP Salesforce and legacy enterprise systems without custom integration code at scale?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.
